yamasambililo ya 2023 Zambia Curiculum Framewrk ilekomaila pafyo 
abasambi balingile ukwishiba ifili pamo nga ukubombela pamo, 
ukutontonkanya mukushika, ukucenjela mufyakupanga-panga na 
amaano yacifyalilwa, inshila shakupwishamo amafya, ukwishiba 
nokutontonkanya ifyakusobolola imilandu, ukuibaka mu maano, 
ukwishiba ukubomfya kompyuta mukulemba nokubelenga elyo 
nokwishiba ifyakucita amakwebo yakuisungilamo.  
 Imitwe yamasambililo, imitwe inoono, nokutendeka ukubomfya iyi 
nshila yamasabililo ikabila ukukomaila pakwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo 
iyalekana-lekana elyo nokuipelesha pamaka mumibombele.

5 
 
Kanshi ndi nesubilo ilyakuti iyi mipekanishishe yamasamambililo ili 
nokwafwilisha apakalamba ukupitila mukubimbamo abasambi bonse 
muno caalo ca Zambia. 
 
Ici citabo cilelanga ukuipelesha ukwaba pa ciputulwa ca masambililo 
pakuti ubu bupilibulo bwa masambililo bube ubwayanguka kuli 
bakafundisha, ukupitila mukubalangilila bwini-bwino ifyakufunda, 
ukulondolola mukwanguka imilimo nangula ifyakucita elyo nenshila 
shakweseshamo abasambi ishalekana-lekana mu mipekanishishe ipya 
iya masambililo. Leelo nangula cingaba ifi, bakafundisha bali 
abasuminishiwa nokucincishiwa ukulundamo imilimo iyo bengamona 
iyakwafwa abasambi ukulingana nefyo bengafwailisha ukupitila mufyo 
baasambilila, mukucincila, nokusalapuka kwabo pakuti bakwanisha 
ukubiikamo imilimo imo-imo iishili muli ici citabo leelo ilemoneka 
ukukabilwa panshita balefunda abasambi mu ncende shabo.

abasambi baleishiba: Outcome-Based Curriculum (OBC) ukuya 
kunshila iipya iyakukansha abasambi ukwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo: 
Competence-Based Curriculum (CBC).

6 
 
 
Uku kupituluka mu masambililo nakabili kwabeleleko pamulandu 
wakufwaya inshila yakukana peelafye abaana amano yakwishibafye 
ifuntu epela leelo ukubapeela na ubwishibilo pafyo bacindikakisha, 
ukukwata imbela iyisuma nokwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo iyo 
bengalabomba namubuumi bwabo ilyo bapwisha amasukulu yabo 
nangula ilyo bapwisha amasambilil yabo. 
 
 
Joel Kamoko (Mr.) 
Permanent Secretary – Educational Services 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

AMASHIWI YAMO-YAMO AYABOMFIWA MUCITABO 
Amabumba – fintu ifyalingana ifibikilwe pamo 
Iciunda – icongo ico icifuma mukulanda, mukulisha ing’oma nangu 
icintu icapala akapyelele 
Ifisolobelo – ifintu ifyo babomfya pakubomba umulimo umo 
Ifikomo – ifintu fimofimo ifibomba nga inceshi mu milandu atemwa mu 
lyaashi 
Imbeela – umusango wakucitilamo ifintu atemwa ifyo icintu caba 
Intambi – ifishilano fya mutundu ifilanga ifyo umutundu wasuminamo 
Ing’omba – mushika wa nyimbo makamaka uwimbila imfumu. 
Ipinda – insoselo iyakwata ubupilibulo ubwashika. 
Lembalemba – akapepala akanakanaka atemwa akalesha kabuta 
kalya kapangwa kuli tandabube ako babika ku moondo atemwa ku 
mutolilo pakuti ulefumya iciunda cayana. 
Ukubebeta – ukufwailisha ifintu fimo makamaka pakufwaya ubupilibulo 
bwacintu. 
Ukulengulula – ukufwailisha icinshinka 
Ukusobolola – ukubika ifintu umo filingile ukuba 
Ukutumbula – Ukusosa icili ku mutima

10 
 
Umoondo – cimuti icafukulwa mukati elyo batula utupunda apo 
bakakatika lembalemba pakuti cilelila nga ing’oma 
Umupukumo – inyimbo shansansa isho abantu beemba ngabali pa 
maliila atemwa ilyo balenwa ubwalwa. 
Umushimpo – cimuti icabaswa icakulishishako ing’oma atemwa 
umoondo. 
Litilica iyakulandafye- iyo mucigeleshiu iitwa nga Oral lliterature 
Litilica iyalembwa-   iyo mucingeleshi iitwa nga Written literature

UMUTWE 1: INTENDEKELO YACISAMBILILO CA LITILICA 
 
Ubulondoloshi:  
Muli uyu mutwe, abasambi balatendeka icisambililo ca Litilica. 
Balasambilila ubupilibulo bwa Litilica pakuti beshibe ifyo ici icisambililo 
cilolekeshapo. Isambililo lyalalondolola ubipilibulo bwa Litilica apo 
apali ukutantika ubupilibulo bwa Litilica ubwa lekana-lekana elyo na 
ukulondolola 
cila 
bupilibulo 
ubupeelwe. 
Nakabili, 
abasambi 
balabebeta ubupilibulo bwa Litilica ubwa lekana-lekana ukupitila 
mukubebeta ubupilibulo, ukupalanya na ukupusanya ubupilibulo bwa 
lekana-lekana elyo na ukulengulula ubupilibulo bwa lekana-lekana. 
Teico ceka, abasambi balaipangila abene ubupilbulo bwa ishiwi lya 
Litilica na ukulanga ifyo ubo ubilibulo bwinga suntinkanya ukulingana 
na icisambililo ca Litilica.   
 
Umutwe Unoono 1: Ubupilibulo bwa ishiwi lya Litilica 
 
Ubulondoloshi:  
Muli uyu mutwe, abasambi balasambilila pabulondoloshi bwa ishiwi lya 
Litilica apo apali ubipilibulo bwa ici cisambililo ukubikapofye na 
ubulondoloshi bwa icisambililo ca Litilica ubwa pusana-pusana. 
Abasambi balatantika ubupilibulo bwa Litilica ubwa lekana-lekana 
elyo na ukulondolola umo cila bupilibulo bwalola  
 
Ifilekabilwa Ukwishiba: Abasambi balekabilwa ukwishiba ubupilibulo 
bwa Litilica 
Ifikomo fyakufunda:  
• Ukwishiba ubipilibulo bwa Litilica  
• Ukutantika ubipilibulo bwa Litilica ubwa lekana-lekana 
• Ukulondolola ubipilibulo bwa Litilica ubwa lekana-lekana

17 
 
Icishibisho kuli Kafundisha:  
Kafundisha umone ukuti abasambi baishiba ukulondolola ubupilibulo 
bwa Litilica, batantinke ubupilibulo bwa Litilica ubwa lekana-lekana 
elyo bapeele na ubulondoloshi bwa cila bupilibulo ubupeelwe  
 
Ifyakubomfya pakufunda: Ifitabo, bamagazine, amapepala yalyashi 
 
Ifyakucita:  
Abasambi bafile ukupeela nokutantika ubupilibulo bweshiwi lya Litilica

yakulandafye tayabafye mumashiwi yalefuma mukanwa, leelo 
nakufishibilo fyakubomfya iminwe pakulanda maka-maka kubantu 
abo beta abati bankoma-matwi.
